pages.text: &6Spiritualism&r, a culture doctrine, opens the founding of a &6Faith&r. A faith sits above factions: it is a server-level body, the first thing in the world bigger than any single banner, and choosing one is as weighty as adopting a code of laws.

Faith comes in early forms. &6Astrology&r reads meaning in drawn constellations and grants quiet, passive benefits. &6Totemic&r faith centers on totem-pole rituals that grant power but also make demands of the faithful.
A faith can spread beyond the settlement that founded it, drawing others in. It is a long-term path of its own, distinct from the science and culture trees, and it deepens as the eras advance.
